title: Pods, Multi-Container Composition, Lifecycle, Termination, and Debug Containers · Platform-System Defense
summary: A release review compares fresh pods, multi-container composition, lifecycle, termination, and debug containers choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded Pod composition and lifecycle manifest. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain Pod identity, scheduling unit, shared network and volumes, isolated process and filesystem boundaries, and ephemeral replacement.
Choose init, app, native sidecar, adapter, ambassador, and helper containers from startup, restart, ownership, shutdown, and resource contracts.
Trace waiting, running, terminated, reasons, exit codes, restartPolicy, backoff, previous state, and Pod phase without equating them.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Pod Shared Boundaries · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Shared Boundaries
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Pod has an init container that never completes, a sidecar that outlives the app, an ephemeral debug container, restart count 4, and an emptyDir holding the only diagnosis. Explain phase, container state, restart, sharing, and replacement boundaries. Competency probe: Explain Pod identity, scheduling unit, shared network and volumes, isolated process and filesystem boundaries, and ephemeral replacement.

Which action demonstrates K8s Pod Shared Boundaries without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: K8s Pod Shared Boundaries · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Shared Boundaries.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain pod identity, scheduling unit, shared network and volumes, isolated process and filesystem boundaries, and ephemeral replacement. For K8s Pod Shared Boundaries · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Shared Boundaries, keep K8s Pod Shared Boundaries connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
